🎵 VOZZ RICH - ELECTRONIC PRESS KIT 2025 🎵

🎧 ARTIST PROFILE
• Stage Name: Vozz Rich
• Genre: Electronic, House, Dance
• Based in: United States
• Signature Sound: Blend of Detroit house, underground rave, salsa, techno, and big room

📈 STREAMING & SOCIAL STATS
• Spotify Monthly Listeners: 24,778
• Spotify Followers: 4,109
• Instagram Followers: 4,875
• Total Platform Presence: Available on 25+ major streaming services

🎼 NOTABLE RELEASES (2024-2025)
• "House Ablaze" (December 2024)
• "Mi Corazon Batalla" - Original & Extended Mix (August 2024)
• "Breathless" feat. L25 (July 2024)
• "Don't Want It to End" - Multiple Remixes featuring Kicevski, Pillars, PYM

🤝 COLLABORATIONS
• Artsychoke - "Butterflies" (Vozz Rich Remix)
• Jaytor - "Dance All Night" (Vozz Rich Remix)
• Kelly Reverb & Chad LeMans - "Let This One Ride" (Vozz Rich Remix)
• Kicevski - "Safe and Sound"

💫 UNIQUE SELLING POINTS
• Multicultural influence incorporating Latin elements
• Versatile production style spanning house sub-genres
• Strong remix portfolio
• Consistent release schedule with original productions and remixes

📊 GROWTH METRICS
• Steady increase in Last.fm listeners (608 to 729 over 3 months)
• Growing catalog with 47+ tracks
• International presence across major streaming platforms
